nav.podcastsEnablePrompt: Enable Podcasts in Settings → Add-ons to open Pods

searchPlaceholder.default: What do you want to play?

shell.searchAriaLabel: Search music, artists, albums, and playlists
shell.androidServerBanner: Full catalog needs Sandbox Server on your network — open Settings → Vault to connect. Locker tracks on this device work offline.
shell.mobileResolverBanner: Sandbox Server is offline and no mobile resolver is enabled — install one under Settings → Extensions → Mobile Resolvers for on-device playback.
shell.tauriCastBanner: Sonos / UPnP: use Cast → Scan network in this app (Sandbox Server required). Chromecast: open in Chrome or Edge on this PC — same Wi‑Fi as your TV.
shell.castBrowserChromecastNote: Chromecast needs Chrome or Edge. Firefox can open the app but cannot cast to Google Cast devices.
shell.tvCoverageBanner: TV mode: Home, Discover, Locker, and Settings are remote-friendly. Search, Podcasts, and Insights use phone layouts — Locker, Playlists, and Feed are partial on a TV remote.

serverSetup.title: Connect Sandbox Server
serverSetup.hint: Full catalog, downloads, and sync need Sandbox Server on your home network. Scan your LAN, enter an address, or continue with locker-only playback on this device.

serverDiscovery.localDeviceHint: Run Sandbox Server on this PC — included with the desktop app.
serverDiscovery.localNetworkHint: Connect to Sandbox Server on your Wi‑Fi — home PC, NAS, or Raspberry Pi.
serverDiscovery.remoteHint: Use a Tailscale, Headscale, or Nebula URL when away from home.
serverDiscovery.lockerOnlyHint: Play downloads on this device — configure a server later in Settings → Vault.
serverDiscovery.lockerOnlyStatus: Locker playback works on this device. Add a Sandbox Server anytime for catalog and sync.
serverDiscovery.lanDetecting: Detecting LAN address for phones on your Wi‑Fi…
serverDiscovery.scanning: Scanning your subnet for Sandbox Server on port 3001…
serverDiscovery.scanEmpty: No servers found — enter the address manually or check that Sandbox Server is running.
serverDiscovery.scanStubNote: Subnet scan (not full mDNS yet). For speaker discovery use Cast → Scan network.
serverDiscovery.remoteTokenHint: Optional — for secured overlay endpoints or provider OAuth bridges.
serverDiscovery.storageHint: Music files for sync and downloads live on the Sandbox Server host. Override path via server environment variables.
serverDiscovery.performanceHint: Locker search (Meilisearch) and download helper (yt-dlp) run on the server host — see System Status in Diagnostics.
serverDiscovery.logsHint: Server logs appear on the host machine terminal. Use Diagnostics → validation suite for API health checks.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Sandbox Music
welcome.body: Your local-first music console. Personalize your station in a few quick steps — or skip anytime.
welcome.mobileBody: Sandbox Music on this device — locker tracks play here. Connect to Sandbox Server on your home network for full catalog, downloads, and search (setup follows your profile).
welcome.desktopBody: Sandbox Music and Sandbox Server install together on this PC — one setup. Your locker folder, bundled server (auto-starts), and network sharing in a few quick steps — or skip anytime.

name.title: What should we call you?
name.hint: Optional — shown in your profile. Change anytime in Settings.

taste.title: What do you listen to?
taste.hint: Pick genres or add artists — helps Discover and Feed learn your taste.

locker.title: Choose save folder
locker.hint: Pick a folder on this device for downloads and imports.
locker.mobileHint: Downloads and imports are saved automatically to private app storage — no folder to choose on this device.
locker.browseDesktopOnly: Folder picking requires the desktop app
locker.desktopFootnote: Suggested path shown — edit or browse to change. Leave blank for default app storage. Change anytime in Settings → Vault.
locker.mobileNote: Music is saved to private app storage on this device — not in your browser. Sync across devices in Settings → Vault.
locker.webNote: In the browser, music stays in this profile's local storage — not a folder on disk.
locker.webDesktopCta: Use the desktop app to choose a folder on disk.
locker.settingsLater: Skip if unsure — you can change this anytime in Settings → Vault.

server.title: Sandbox Server on this PC
server.titleMobile: Connect to your PC's Sandbox Server
server.hint: Sandbox Server is included with this desktop install — it handles downloads, search, and sharing on your Wi‑Fi. It starts automatically when you open the app or play catalog tracks.
server.hintMobile: Sandbox Server runs on your home PC with the desktop app (installed together). Point this device at your PC's address — same Wi‑Fi.
server.anchorHint: Recommended — bundled Sandbox Server runs here for downloads, search, and sharing. Starts automatically on launch and when you play catalog tracks.
server.offHint: Locker tracks play on this PC. Catalog playback needs Sandbox Server — use included server on this PC or a remote URL in Settings.
server.offHintMobile: Locker tracks play on this device. Full catalog, downloads, and search need Sandbox Server on your home PC — configure the PC address above or in Settings.
server.remoteHint: Connect to Sandbox Server elsewhere — another PC, NAS, or Raspberry Pi — e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3001
server.remoteHintMobile: Connect to Sandbox Server on your home PC — e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3001 (find your PC's IP with ipconfig on Windows or ifconfig on Mac/Linux).
server.lanIpHelper: Find your PC's LAN IP: Windows → open Command Prompt → ipconfig → IPv4 Address. Mac/Linux → Terminal → ifconfig or ip addr.
server.settingsLater: Change this anytime in Settings → Vault.
server.remoteSettingsLater: Enter the address now, or set it later in Settings → Vault.
server.connectionOk: Connected — full catalog playback is ready.
server.connectionFailed: Cannot reach server — check IP, port 3001, same Wi‑Fi, and that Sandbox Server is running on your network.

playback.title: Test audio on this device
playback.hint: Tap below to play a short test tone through ExoPlayer. You should hear a clear one-second beep — that confirms native playback works.
playback.success: Audio output works — locker tracks will play offline.
playback.failed: Playback test failed — check volume and notification permission.
playback.skipHint: You can retry anytime in Settings → Playback.

identity.title: Your node on the mesh
identity.hint: This device fingerprint identifies your node on the Sandbox mesh. It stays on this device.

cast.title: Send music to speakers & TV
cast.dlnaTitle: Sonos & network speakers — in this app
cast.dlnaHint: With Sandbox Server running, open Cast on the player and tap Scan network to find Sonos or UPnP speakers. Playback stays in the desktop app — no browser needed.
cast.chromecastHint: Google Cast (Chromecast, Android TV, Shield) requires Chrome or Edge. The desktop app opens a local copy in your chosen browser — pick default, Chrome, or Edge below.
cast.settingsLater: Skip if you do not cast yet — Sonos/UPnP scan is in the player Cast menu; Chromecast browser choice is in Settings → Fidelity.

finish.headline: You're all set
finish.body: Your Sandbox music is ready. Explore your locker, Discover new music, and tune Settings anytime.
finish.bodyMobile: Your device locker is ready. Use the bottom tabs (Home, Library, Search, Pods, Menu) to get around. For full catalog and downloads, keep Sandbox Server running on your home PC — this app connects to it over Wi‑Fi.

player.volumeBoostNote: On Android, drag above 100% for software boost beyond the device volume buttons.
player.resolveTimedOut: Stream resolve timed out — player cleared
player.lockerAudioMissing: Offline audio is missing or corrupted on this device — open the track menu and download to Locker again

queueDrawer.title: Queue
queueDrawer.empty: Queue is empty. Play or add tracks to fill it.
queueDrawer.suggestedEmpty: No suggestions yet — play a track from your locker to see related picks.

sovereignUpNext.title: Sovereign Up Next
sovereignUpNext.hint: One queue for music and podcasts — enable to filter unplayed episodes, insert newest at top, or stop after N episodes.
sovereignUpNext.stoppedAfterN: Stopped after {count, plural, one {# episode} other {# episodes}} — sleep timer

mixRadioSave.intro: Choose how to save these tracks.
mixRadioSave.optionPlaylistDesc: Saved to Discover and Locker playlists — playable without full download.
mixRadioSave.optionLockerDesc: Save full audio files to your device when available.
mixRadioSave.toastLockerAlready: Tracks are already in your Locker

home.playHistory: Play history builds as you listen

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Audio quality, playback, storage, and optional home-server features.

navPins.title: Navigation tabs
navPins.hint: Pick 4 destinations for the bottom bar — Home, Library, Search, and Podcasts by default. Menu is always the fifth tab.
navPins.reset: Reset to Home · Library · Search · Podcasts

categories.playbackDesc: Gapless, crossfade, sleep timer, and car mode
categories.vinylDesc: Record player visuals, genre themes, and community packs
categories.aboutDesc: App info, guides, and getting started

about.title: About Sandbox Music
about.hint: Quick reference for optional features — no popups on launch; open panels here when you need them.
about.tagline: Local-first music console — locker, playback, and optional home-server integrations.
about.gettingStartedLocker: Add music in Locker — upload tracks or folders from your device.
about.gettingStartedServer: Optional Sandbox Server (Settings → Add-ons) unlocks downloads, locker search, and feed releases.
about.gettingStartedConnect: Multi-device playback and Connect role (host/remote) live in Settings → Playback.
about.gettingStartedCar: Car Mode is in Settings → Playback — large controls for in-vehicle use on Android.
about.addonGuideHint: Host a JSON file over HTTPS. Sandbox reads name, version, and search level (1–4).
about.connectHint: Enable multi-device playback in Playback settings, then pick host, remote, or auto role and set your Sandbox Server URL.

fidelity.title: AUDIO FIDELITY DECODER RESOLUTION
fidelity.hint: Configure active resolution limits. True studio monitors require lossless to bypass compression.
fidelity.standardDesc: 1411 kbps standard web audio file decode
fidelity.castHint: Cast audio to a receiver on your network, or show the visualizer on TV{customReceiver}.
fidelity.castOpensUrl: Opens {url} in your selected browser (packaged desktop starts a local mini-server automatically).
fidelity.castOpenChrome: Open in Chrome for Sandbox Cast
fidelity.castRequiresChrome: Sandbox Cast requires Chrome or Edge. Use screen mirror below on Firefox.
fidelity.castAutoCastHint: Cast to the default Sandbox Cast device when a track is loaded.
fidelity.castServerRequired: Start your Sandbox Server to enable speaker streaming
fidelity.networkSpeakersHint: Stream to home network speakers on your local network. Requires your Sandbox Server running on your home network.
fidelity.customReceiverHint: TV visualizer requires a custom cast receiver ID in app configuration. Audio casting uses the default media receiver.

language.title: LANGUAGE
language.hint: Choose your interface language. Changes apply immediately across the app.

architect.panelHint: Pick a color theme for backgrounds, borders, and focus highlights. Sandbox orange stays on brand marks and primary actions.
architect.readabilityHint: Font and size apply across Home, Locker, DJ Console, and all stations.

presets.focusDesc: Calm gray surfaces for long sessions. Blue focus highlights.
presets.tacticalMidnightDesc: Dark cockpit with orange-tinted borders. Legacy orange focus.
presets.lightCanvasDesc: Bright daylight surfaces with dark hairline borders.
presets.hcTerminalDesc: High-contrast near-black and olive with gold focus.
presets.deepOceanDesc: Blue-black depths with teal panels and cyan borders.
presets.bloodMoonDesc: Aggressive dark red with vivid red focus.

architect.engineHint: Adjust the focus highlight color. Brand orange on buttons and marks stays the same.
architect.heroDisplayHint: Choose what shows on the Home vinyl and player bar thumbnail.
architect.heroDisplayVinylShadesDesc: Colored record gradient that changes per track.
architect.albumCardHint: Scale album and playlist cards. Larger = fewer per row, more detail.
architect.vinylVisualsHint: Opt-in psychedelic effects on the home record player. Default is subtle — crank sliders for wild mode.
architect.vinylUniverseIntensityHint: Master dial — ambient glow and overall trippiness.
architect.vinylColorThrowHint: Streaks and beams radiating from the vinyl.
architect.vinylPulseHint: Ambient pulse speed and depth while playing.
architect.vinylHueDriftHint: Slow rotating hue shift over time.
architect.vinylSpinTrailHint: Motion blur and afterimage on the spinning disc.
architect.vinylWarpHint: Subtle scale and skew oscillation on the disc.
architect.recordPlayerAddonsHint: Install visual packs from the community. Sliders above fine-tune any active pack. One pack active at a time.
architect.recordPlayerAddonUrlRequired: Paste a pack manifest URL first.
architect.recordPlayerAddonImportFailed: Clipboard JSON is not a valid pack.
architect.controlsHint: Keyboard bindings and search UI preferences.
architect.shortcutsHint: Global bindings when not typing in a field.
architect.searchSortHint: Controls artist album and single listings in search drill-down.

vinyl.title: VINYL SETTINGS
vinyl.hint: Customize the home record player visuals. Official presets ship with Sandbox; community packs are user-installed only.
vinyl.displayModeManualHint: Pick an official preset and fine-tune with sliders.
vinyl.displayModeFollowGenreHint: Auto-switch visuals from the current track's genre metadata.
vinyl.displayModeFollowArtHint: Sample colors from cover art — the room glows with the song's palette.
vinyl.artBlendHint: Blend title-seed colors with sampled album art. Turn up to paint the universe from the cover.
vinyl.officialPresetsHint: Built-in Sandbox looks — tap Use to activate. No install required.
vinyl.genreMappingHint: When Follow genre is on, tap the color bar on each row to pick a vinyl shade for that genre.
vinyl.visualSlidersHint: Fine-tune any mode — values blend at 50% with the active preset or genre theme.
vinyl.mobilePreviewNote: Preview quality on phone — Trip, DMT, and warp effects stay on desktop. Sliders save your prefs but visuals are capped for battery.
vinyl.mobileHeroDisplayHint: Album art or spinning vinyl on the home hero.
vinyl.mobileThemeHint: Quick palette for focus highlights — full theme architect is on desktop.
vinyl.mobileVisualHint: Subtle ambient effects around the disc — desktop has more presets and sliders.
vinyl.universeIntensityHint: Master dial — ambient glow and overall trippiness.
vinyl.colorThrowHint: Streaks and beams radiating from the vinyl.
vinyl.pulseHint: Ambient pulse speed and depth while playing.
vinyl.hueDriftHint: Slow rotating hue shift over time.
vinyl.spinTrailHint: Motion blur and afterimage on the spinning disc.
vinyl.warpHint: Subtle scale and skew oscillation on the disc.
vinyl.communityPacksHint: Only packs you install from a URL, catalog, or clipboard appear here.
vinyl.communityEmpty: No community packs installed yet — browse the catalog or install from a URL.
vinyl.installUrlRequired: Paste a pack manifest URL first.
vinyl.importFailed: Clipboard JSON is not a valid pack.

playback.title: PLAYBACK
playback.hint: Gapless playback, crossfade, multi-device sync, high-quality desktop output, sleep timer, and car mode.
playback.gaplessDesc: Pre-load the next track so playback continues without a pause.
playback.crossfadeDesc: Blend the end of one track into the start of the next. On Android with ExoPlayer, crossfade runs natively and works alongside gapless.
playback.multiDeviceDesc: Keep playback in sync across devices on your home network. The host plays audio; other devices send transport commands.
playback.multiDeviceSetupHint: Role, device name, and Sandbox Server URL for home-network playback sync.
playback.roleHint: Role on your home network. Auto picks host on desktop and remote on phone. Effective:
playback.miniPlayerHint: Choose how playback appears when you leave the app on Android.
playback.miniPlayerOff: Off — lock screen and notification only
playback.miniPlayerPip: Picture in picture — floating album art window
playback.miniPlayerTopBar: System top bar — notification shade / now playing
playback.miniPlayerTopBarNote: Top bar style uses your phone's system now playing (lock screen + notification shade). OEM mini capsules (Realme, OnePlus, etc.) appear when the OS supports them; this app cannot replicate Dynamic Island on all devices.
playback.batterySaverDesc: Reduces visual effects, slows UI polling, pauses background locker sync while hidden, and drops the playback notification immediately when paused. With Battery Saver off, paused playback keeps lock-screen controls for 15 minutes.
playback.nativePlaybackDesc: Default Android decode path — ExoPlayer outside the WebView for background stability and gapless albums. Offline locker tracks stream via content:// from IndexedDB without Sandbox Server HTTP.
playback.webViewCrossfadeDesc: Escape hatch only — routes decode to HTMLAudioElement inside the WebView. Disables ExoPlayer while enabled. Normal crossfade uses native ExoPlayer volume ramps instead.
playback.usbBitPerfectDesc: When a USB DAC is connected on Android 14+, request MIXER_BEHAVIOR_BIT_PERFECT and bypass app-side ReplayGain volume scaling. Requires device HAL support.
playback.usbBitPerfectUnavailable: Not available on this device or Android version.
playback.usbBitPerfectReady: USB DAC connected — bit-perfect mixer available.
playback.usbBitPerfectActive: Bit-perfect path active — OS owns volume.
playback.wiredDacStabilityDesc: For USB-C DAC dongles and wired IEMs: larger decode buffers, disables gapless/crossfade during USB output, ignores brief plug wobble, and auto-resumes when the wired route returns.
playback.wiredDacStabilityActive: Wired output detected — stability mode is active.
playback.scrobbleHint: Send now-playing and scrobbles when a track finishes or passes 50% listened. API keys respect Ephemeral Chamber when enabled.
playback.scrobbleLastfmDesc: Now playing + scrobble via audioscrobbler API. Requires API key and session key from Last.fm.
playback.scrobbleListenbrainzDesc: Submit listens to ListenBrainz. Requires a user token from listenbrainz.org.
playback.scrobbleAirGapHint: Air-Gap Mode blocks outbound scrobbling unless a LAN Sandbox Server relays Last.fm requests. See docs/scrobbling.md.
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep1: 1. Create an API account at last.fm/api/account/create
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep2: 2. Paste your API key above, then open the auth link below in a browser
playback.scrobbleLastfmSetupStep3: 3. After approving, copy the session key (sk) from the redirect URL or use Last.fm's getSession API
playback.replayGainDiagnosticsHint: Live loudness normalization on the ReplayGain Web Audio stage (independent of user volume).
playback.audioOutputHint: Current Android playback route. Bluetooth and wired headphones are selected automatically by the OS.
playback.sonicHint: Tuned for your speaker. Stays on your device.
playback.sonicEnableDesc: ReplayGain loudness match, device-aware EQ, soft limiting, and ear-safe listening — all processed locally.
playback.sonicEarSafeDesc: After long sessions at high volume, gently lowers gain to protect your hearing. Never blocks volume entirely.
playback.sonicEarSafeToast: Listening level softened to protect your ears. You can turn this off in Settings → Playback.
playback.sonicRouteAndroidNote: Route is detected by Android and updates when you connect headphones or Bluetooth.
playback.sonicOutputOverrideHint: Override output tuning when Auto doesn't detect your setup.
playback.sonicRouteDesktopNote: On Windows and Linux desktop, choose Speaker, Headphones, or Line out when Auto shows Unknown.
playback.spatialEnableDesc: Headphone stereo widener — cross-delay immersion without cloud processing. Wired or Bluetooth routes only.
playback.spatialHeadphoneNote: Spatial widener applies when output route is wired headphones or Bluetooth.
playback.peqPresetHint: Parametric EQ curves layered in Sandbox Sonic. Route auto keeps device compensation; other presets replace it.
playback.sonicCastNote: Enhanced audio applies on this device (phone speaker, wired, Bluetooth, TV WebView, laptop, PC speakers, line out). In-app cast from your phone processes audio before streaming to Chromecast or similar. Pure Alexa skills, Sonos app, or other external players are outside this app.
playback.audiophileHintSupported: Bit-perfect native output via WASAPI exclusive on Windows. Bypasses WebView resampling; FLAC/WAV decode in Rust. Disabled by default.
playback.audiophileHintUnsupported: Native audiophile playback requires the Sovereign desktop (Tauri) build on Windows.
playback.audiophileDesktopOnly: Available in the Sovereign desktop (Tauri) build only.
playback.audiophileEnableDesc: Routes playback to the native engine instead of HTMLAudioElement.
playback.audiophileExclusiveDesc: Direct device access at source sample rate (Windows).
playback.audiophileDecodeNote: MP3/AAC are software-decoded to PCM (not passthrough). Volume, crossfade, and ReplayGain Web Audio stages are bypassed in audiophile mode.
playback.carModeHint: Large touch targets and locked navigation for in-vehicle playback on Android. Also available from the player bar car icon or long-press on now playing.
playback.carModeSuggestDesc: Show a one-time prompt to enter Car Mode when the app opens.
playback.resolutionHint: Hybrid source selection — locker, cache, Sandbox Server, mobile resolvers, then catalog preview.
playback.resolutionMobileNone: None enabled — install a resolver addon
playback.resolutionOrderHint: Auto-selected each play — no manual mode switch.
playback.resolutionLastSourceEmpty: No track resolved yet this session
playback.resolutionResolverStubHint: On-device yt-dlp extraction (Android). Disable here to skip mobile resolution.

addons.builtinStationsHint: Optional stations that appear in the station menu when enabled.
addons.discoverStationHint: Feed, Explore, and Playlists in one station. Feed shows new releases from your home music server when the Sandbox Server is running. Chart picks work without it.
addons.libraryStationHint: Browse and play Jellyfin or Navidrome libraries on your LAN via the Sandbox Server proxy.
addons.sonicLockerStationHint: Taste-scored mix radio from your Locker — session context, profile affinity, genre, and sonic features. Tap a track to see why it was picked.
addons.lockerAutoFollowHint: Automatically follow artists in your Locker so their new releases and tour dates appear in Feed. Unfollow any artist to stop.
addons.followedReleaseNotifHint: Show a count on Menu when artists you follow release new music. Opens For you feed; posts to your phone notification shade when the app is in the background (grant permission in Android settings).
addons.acquisitionHint: Optional home server for catalog downloads, full-text locker search, and built-in Sandbox Indexer. Catalog playback requires Sandbox Server for full streams.
addons.acquisitionTierHint: Choose which tier the Sandbox Server uses for streaming, caching, and locker downloads.
addons.acquisitionTierBestDesc: Try Tier 4 debrid first, then Tier 3 proxy
addons.sandboxIndexerHint: Built into the Sandbox Server — yt-dlp + Archive.org search. No external Prowlarr required for basic acquire.
addons.sandboxIndexerOffline: Start Sandbox Server to enable built-in indexer
addons.torznabHint: Self-hosted Jackett or Torznab URLs you configure — not required for Archive.org or yt-dlp search.
addons.externalIndexerHint: Optional — external Prowlarr for private trackers (advanced). Sandbox Indexer works without this.
addons.serverUrlOptionalHint: Leave blank for standalone use. Add your PC or NAS URL for downloads, mesh feed, Connect, and locker sync.
addons.serverUrlMobileHint: On mobile, enter your computer's local IP address, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3001. Find it: Windows → ipconfig | Mac/Linux → ifconfig
addons.podcastIndexerKeyPlaceholder: From your podcast indexer app → Settings → General
addons.premiumDownloadsKeyPlaceholder: From your premium download service account page
addons.discogsApiTokenPlaceholder: Optional — faster API lookup if you have one
addons.discogsApiTokenHint: Not required. Cover art uses public Discogs search pages by default; add a token only for higher rate limits.
addons.serverSetupHint: Start the Sandbox Server on your PC or NAS and enter its URL above. Catalog links use the download helper on the server; premium downloads work when keys are set.
addons.lockerSearchHint: {status} — searches your locker by title, artist, and album.
addons.lockerSearchFootnote: Uses Meilisearch on the Sandbox Server.
addons.experimentalHint: Reveal built-in dev-test addons (SoundCloud, WebTorrent, IPFS, Radio Browser, Audius) in Settings and search. Turning ON auto-enables them for Sandbox Server resolve testing.
addons.experimentalHiddenHint: Built-in dev-test addons are hidden. Enable Show Experimental Integrations under Settings → Addons to try SoundCloud, WebTorrent, IPFS, Radio Browser, and Audius via Sandbox Server. User manifest addons work without this toggle.
addons.djConsoleDesc: Show the DJ mixer in the station menu. Enable DJ audio routing below for 2-deck Web Audio crossfade and stem mixing.
addons.djAudioRoutingDesc: Route locker deck URLs through Web Audio with crossfade, EQ, and Demucs stem mixes. Off = visual-only DJ Console.
addons.stemSeparationHint: Background Demucs on the server (DJ Console → Stems). Cached stems power the player Stem mix panel — not live separation during playback.
addons.stemSeparationUnavailable: Demucs not installed — on the server host run: docker compose --profile stems up
addons.personalAddonPackHint: Pre-installed dev-test addons wired to Sandbox Server resolve. Toggle enable/disable — built-ins cannot be removed.
addons.statusExperimentalHint: Resolve works when the Sandbox Server is configured and this addon is enabled.
addons.devBadgeHint: Dev-test addon — Sandbox Server resolve when server URL is configured.

security.title: SECURITY
security.hint: Credential storage, Sandbox Server access controls, and session hygiene.
security.airGapHint: Block all outbound internet from the app. Your locker, playlists, locker search on the Sandbox Server, and downloads stored on the server still work. Catalog search, metadata, podcast feeds, streaming links, and new downloads are disabled.
security.ephemeralChamberHint: Store podcast indexer and premium download keys in session-only storage (cleared when the tab closes).
security.ghostProtocolHint: Remove API keys and sign-in tokens from storage when you sign out.
security.lanPartyHint: Air-gap preset for Connect + DLNA + offline locker only — zero WAN. See docs/air-gap-lan-party.md for car Pi + phone hotspot setup.
security.defenseProtocolHint: Restricts which sites the Sandbox Server can proxy for streaming. When enabled, Interminable Tide may serve infinite procedural audio to flagged scrapers (bad User-Agent, missing auth, rate spikes) — not to authenticated Subsonic clients or the Sandbox app (X-Sandbox-Client). See docs/interminable-tide.md.
security.defenseProtocolFootnote: Env: TIER34_DEFENSE_PROTOCOL, TIER34_INTERMINABLE_TIDE (chaff|jitter|both|off). Server offline — toggle saved locally and synced on next connect.
security.dataPersistenceHint: Keep theme and playback preferences on this device. When off, non-secret preferences are cleared when the tab closes.
security.serverKeysHint: Store podcast indexer and premium download keys in the Sandbox Server host environment so keys never leave your home server. UI security headers are enabled in the main app.

diagnostics.title: DIAGNOSTICS
diagnostics.hint: End-to-end checks for Sandbox Server health, locker sync, downloads, library catalog, multi-device playback, and speaker streaming.
diagnostics.sovereignStatusHint: Live health for Sandbox Server, locker search, download helper, network speakers, multi-device playback, and locker sync. Offline rows explain what still works on this device. Auto-refreshes every 20s.
diagnostics.sovereignValidationLink: Need deeper checks? Use the server validation suite below.
diagnostics.sovereignChecking: Checking Sandbox Server, locker search, download helper, network speakers, multi-device playback, and locker sync…
diagnostics.validationIdleHint: Run validation to check Sandbox Server health, locker sync, multi-device relay, and speaker streams. Start your Sandbox Server on the host machine first.
diagnostics.validationFootnote: Runs against your configured Sandbox Server URL.
diagnostics.clearCacheHint: Remove cached feed, charts, explore picks, and lyrics stored on this device. Your library and settings are not affected.
diagnostics.serverUnreachableAndroid: Sandbox Server not reachable — set your network server URL in Settings → Vault → Sandbox Server
diagnostics.serverUnreachableDesktop: Sandbox Server not reachable — start it from Settings → Vault → Sandbox Server or run npm run dev:tier34 for development

vault.title: DEVICE STORAGE
vault.hint: Set how much space this device can use for your locker library.
vault.downloadStorageHint: Catalog downloads do not go to your OS Downloads folder by default. They are saved to your locker on this device. To also keep files on disk, run the Sandbox Server on the machine where you want music stored and enable cross-device sync.
vault.lockerLocationHint: On-device library — private to this profile in this browser. Use cross-device locker sync below to replicate your library to the Sandbox Server.
vault.lockerLocationHintNative: On-device library — stored in private app storage on this device. Use cross-device locker sync below to replicate your library to the Sandbox Server.
vault.serverStorageHint: Music files are stored on the Sandbox Server host (not on this device). Override the folder in the host server environment or see server logs for the full path.
vault.serverStorageIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to see the on-disk music folder.
vault.networkSpeakersHint: Let other devices on your network browse and play your locker library via the Sandbox Server.
vault.networkSpeakersEnvHint: Enabled in server settings at startup. The toggle here applies until the Sandbox Server restarts.
vault.networkSpeakersRuntimeHint: Changes apply immediately. Set the default in the server environment to turn on at boot.
vault.networkSpeakersIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to configure network speaker sharing.
vault.syncHint: Export or import your library list, sync via cloud folder, or mirror music files through the Sandbox Server.
vault.syncSelectiveHint: Only pull albums marked Sync this album in Locker → Albums menu. Cloud file sync for music files — use cloud folder sync or Sandbox Server.
vault.watchFolderHint: The Sandbox Server watches a folder and imports new audio into your locker. This imports from a path — it is not where catalog downloads are saved.
vault.watchFolderPickerHint: Enter the folder path manually, or set a default watch folder in the Sandbox Server host environment.
vault.ingestionGraphHint: Imports run on the machine where the Sandbox Server is started.
vault.deviceIdentityHint: Desktop installation fingerprint (Ed25519). Sovereign mesh signing is not enabled yet.
vault.sandboxServerHint: Included with the desktop app — required for full catalog playback (remote resolve streams), downloads, search, and connecting phones on your Wi‑Fi. Locker tracks play without it.
vault.sandboxServerModeOffDesc: Locker tracks play here. Catalog playback needs Sandbox Server — use included server on this PC or set a remote LAN URL.
vault.sandboxServerModeRemoteDesc: Connect to Sandbox Server on another PC, NAS, or Raspberry Pi — e.g. http://192.168.1.10:3001. On phone, point at your home PC running the desktop app.
vault.sandboxServerModeAnchorDesc: Bundled Sandbox Server runs here for downloads, search, and sharing on your network. Starts automatically when the app opens.
vault.sandboxServerOverlayHint: Over cellular or CGNAT, use your self-hosted overlay address (Headscale/Tailscale or Nebula). See docs/overlay-network.md — not a public relay.
vault.aggressiveCacheHint: On Wi‑Fi, prefetch the full track into stream cache before playback so gapless queue and brief dead zones stay smooth. On cellular this is off unless you turn it on — the next queued track is still cached silently while you listen. Falls back to streaming if prefetch fails or exceeds the per-track size cap. Requires stream cache enabled.
vault.sandboxServerDownloadToLocker: Download acquired tracks to this device's Locker
vault.sandboxServerAutoStart: Start server automatically when app opens
vault.sandboxServerStartOnDesktop: Start Sandbox Server from Settings → Vault on the desktop app, or connect to a server on your network.
vault.defaultDownloadMirrorSuffix: + Sandbox Server when sync is enabled
vault.defaultDownloadSyncHint: — enable Sandbox Server full sync to mirror music files to disk
vault.defaultDownloadImportHint: To import files from an existing music folder (not download TO it), use {watchFolder} below — that watches a path and imports into your locker library list.
vault.streamCacheDesc: Automatic temporary audio on this device — replays without re-resolving server URLs, prefetches the next queued track while you listen, and caches finished tracks on Wi‑Fi. Lighter than Locker: no album credits, no permanent vault slot, entries expire after 7 days and are evicted when the cache limit is reached. Podcast offline episodes saved from the Podcasts station also live here.
vault.flushConfirmMessage: Perform hard sweep of local sound binary partition? Doing so voids sandbox files!

telemetry.title: SIGNAL BENCH
telemetry.hint: Inspect search cache and provider health on your Sandbox Server.
telemetry.collectionIdle: Start your Sandbox Server to view library catalog stats.
telemetry.collectionHealHint: Missing file repair: Settings → Device Capacity → watch folder ingestion, or the server repair endpoint when configured.

sleep.title: Sleep & Wake
sleep.subtitle: Music alarm clock
sleep.playForSuggestions: Play tracks or add to locker for suggestions.
sleep.airGapOnline: Air-gap mode is on. Online catalog search is disabled — use Library or Suggestions from your locker.
sleep.typeTwoChars: Type at least 2 characters to search the catalog.
sleep.noCatalogTracks: No catalog tracks found. Try a suggestion chip above.
sleep.noTracksFound: No tracks found. Play something or add to locker first.
sleep.catalogPreview: Catalog preview (~30s). Acquire the track to your locker for a full-length wake alarm, especially on Android.

connect.title: Set up Sandbox Connect
connect.hostUrlHint: Point remotes at the PC or NAS running your Sandbox Server on your home network (not localhost on phones). Set this in Settings → Addons → Server URL.
connect.roleHint: The host plays audio and publishes state. Remotes send transport commands only.
connect.roleAutoHint: Desktop or Tauri = host. Phone or tablet = remote.
connect.roleHostHint: This device plays audio and syncs queue state to remotes.
connect.roleRemoteHint: Control surface only — playback stays on the host.
connect.deviceHint: Shown to other Connect peers on your LAN. Optional — a default is generated if blank.
connect.urlProtocol: URL must use http:// or https://.
connect.healthFailed: Server did not respond. Check your Sandbox Server is running on your home network.
connect.cannotReach: Cannot reach the Sandbox Server at that URL.
connect.healthOkRelayTimeout: Health OK. Peer-sync relay did not respond in time — Connect may still work.
connect.connected: Connected — Sandbox Server health and peer-sync relay are reachable.
connect.healthOkWsFailed: Health OK. Peer-sync WebSocket could not connect — check firewall rules.
connect.healthOkWsBlocked: Health OK. Could not open peer-sync WebSocket from this browser.

offline.label: Offline

searchHint.airGap: Air-gap mode is on. Catalog and artist images are blocked; locker and playlists on this device still work.
searchHint.noInternet: No internet. Catalog search and artist images are unavailable; your locker on this device still works.
searchHint.tier34Offline: No home server configured. Catalog search, charts, and previews still work; downloads, mesh feed, Connect, and locker sync need a Sandbox Server.

offline.meilisearchDegraded: Locker search uses on-device matching (full-text index offline).

feed.airGap: Air-gap mode blocks network releases. Turn it off in Settings, or run your Sandbox Server on your home network.
feed.noInternet: Network releases need your Sandbox Server on the home network. Open Settings → Diagnostics to check server status.
feed.offline: Set your Sandbox Server URL in Settings → Addons, or open Diagnostics to check server status.

offline.lockerSearch: Sandbox Server offline — searching tracks stored on this device only.
offline.connect: Connect requires the Sandbox Server on your LAN. Check Settings → System Status.

acquire.airGap: Acquisition is disabled while Air-Gap Mode is active.
acquire.tier34Offline: Downloads need the Sandbox Server. They resume when it is back online.
acquire.noInternet: Downloads need internet and the Sandbox Server for source resolution.

offline.artistDiscography: Online catalog is unavailable — discography may show locker albums only.

videoFeed.heroLead: Swipe through music videos from your locker and the mesh
videoFeed.title: Video feed
videoFeed.empty: No videos found. Add videos to your locker or connect Sandbox Server.

home.title: Made for you
home.lead: Daily mixes, release radar, and personalized blends
home.browseLead: Want genres, charts, and mood picks?

smartReorder.label: Smart reorder
smartReorder.toastLimited: Reordered (limited sonic data — analyze tracks for best flow)
smartReorder.coverageLimited: Analyze tracks for BPM & key-aware flow

share.title: Share "{name}"
share.liveLinkHint: Publish a collaborative playlist to your Sandbox Server on LAN. Anyone with the view link can import; editors with the edit link can sync changes.
share.serverRequired: Set Sandbox Server URL in Settings to create live share links.
share.editLinkHint: Keep the edit link private — it allows pushing track changes.
share.importPlaceholder: Paste share link, share id, or LAN API URL…
share.published: Live link ready — copy view or edit link.
share.syncedPush: Pushed your changes to the live playlist
share.syncedPull: Pulled latest tracks from the live playlist
share.syncFailed: Sync failed — check Sandbox Server connection
share.notFound: Shared playlist not found on Sandbox Server

browseFilters.artistsEmpty: No artists yet — upload music to build your library.

locker.pinsFull: Pin slots full — unpin an album first (max 4).
locker.releaseNotifBellAria: {{count}} new releases from artists you follow
locker.uploadMusicOnlyHint: Music only — not audiobooks or podcasts.
locker.uploadFormatsHint: MP3, FLAC, WAV, M4A, OGG — no .m4b audiobooks
locker.uploadAudiobookBlocked: This looks like an audiobook — audiobooks aren't supported in Locker yet.
locker.uploadAudiobookBlockedM4b: Audiobook files (.m4b) aren't supported in Locker yet — use music files only.
locker.uploadAudiobookBlockedMime: This file type is for audiobooks — not supported in Locker yet.
locker.uploadAudiobookBlockedFolder: Audiobook folders can't be imported to Locker — pick a music album folder instead.
locker.uploadAudiobookBlockedLongFile: This single long file looks like an audiobook — Locker is for music albums and tracks.
locker.uploadNonMusicBlockedFolder: This file is in a non-music folder (Documents, voice recordings, etc.) — not imported to Locker.
locker.uploadDownloadPodcastBlocked: Long downloads in Download/ look like podcasts or audiobooks — not imported to Locker.
locker.deviceScanHint: Scans music on this device only — nothing is deleted. Pick tracks to copy into Locker.
locker.deviceScanOtherHint: Not imported to music locker — audiobooks, voice memos, documents, and long downloads.
locker.deviceScanFilteredCount: Filtered out {count} non-music files — expand below to review.
locker.deviceScanOnlyOther: No music found — {count} other audio files were filtered out.
locker.deviceScanMetadataHint: Tags from other players are often wrong. Look up the correct artist, album, artwork, and year.
locker.deviceScanMetadataNone: Couldn't find a match online — open the album in Locker and use Fix all song info from the ⋮ menu.
locker.deviceScanMetadataFailed: Couldn't look up song info — check your connection and try again.
locker.deviceScanMetadataAirGap: You're offline — turn off Air-Gap Mode in Settings to look up song info.
locker.deviceScanPermissionDenied: Music access denied — allow permission to scan your device.
locker.deviceScanEmpty: No music files found on this device.
locker.artistHubPopularTracksHint: Chart rankings · songs in your locker
locker.artistHubNoTracks: No downloaded tracks for this artist.
locker.artistHubNoCredits: No credits stored yet — open an album to fetch credits online.

menu.fixAllSongInfoAlbum: Fix all song info on this album
menu.fixSongInfoNone: Couldn't find a match — try Edit info to fix manually
menu.fixSongInfoFailed: Couldn't look up song info — check your connection
menu.fixArtistSongInfo: Fix song info for this artist
menu.fixingArtistSongInfo: Fixing song info for this artist…
menu.identifyFromCatalogHint: Looks up artist, year, genre, and cover art from online music databases.
menu.identifyManual: Could not identify — edit album artist below

confirm.removeAlbumMessage: Remove "{name}" and all {count} tracks from your locker?

locker.completeMissingQueued: Queued {count} missing track(s) — tap ↓ for progress
locker.completeMissingUnavailable: Could not queue missing tracks — open album in Discover to download

travel.wifiRequired: Connect to Wi‑Fi to download tracks for offline travel.
travel.offlineBlocked: You're offline — connect to Wi‑Fi to prepare tracks.
travel.done: Ready for travel — {prefetched} cached, {skippedLocal} already local{syncPart}.

feed.title: For you
feed.subtitle: Followed artist releases, Release Radar, and your mixes. Chart picks work offline; mesh releases need Sandbox Server on your network.
feed.networkUnavailableNotice: Network releases unavailable — showing catalog picks
feed.meshEmptyHint: No releases from your home server yet — here is music you can play now.

error.title: Could not load network feed
error.timeout: The request timed out. Check Settings → Addons or Diagnostics.
error.failed: Could not reach your network server. Check Settings → Addons or Diagnostics.

empty.title: No music to show yet
empty.message: Search Explore or add music to your Locker to get started.

follow.emptyHint: Follow artists to see new music and tour dates here.

stems.title: Stem mix
stems.serverCachedHint: Pre-separated on server — not live Demucs
stems.notCached: No stems on server. Analyze this track in DJ Console → Stems (locker tracks only).
stems.blockedNative: Stem mix uses Web Audio and is unavailable with native/Exo playback on this device.
stems.analyzeQueued: Stem analysis queued on server — check back in a few minutes.

library.title: Server Library
library.emptyHint: Connect a Jellyfin or Navidrome server on your home network. Playback is proxied through Sandbox Server (port 3001).
library.tier34Required: Server Library needs Sandbox Server on your network — set the URL in Settings → Vault.
library.noAlbums: No albums found on this server.

artist.noSingles: No singles found for this artist.
artist.noAlbums: No albums found for this artist.
artist.catalogUnreachable: Online catalog is unavailable — showing locker albums only.
artist.discographyPartial: Some studio albums may be missing from this list.
artist.discographySupplemented: Full studio discography — matched to the Sandbox catalog.
artist.playbackUnavailable: No stream available for this track
artist.playbackHybridUnavailable: Playback source unavailable. Install a mobile resolver, reconnect to Sandbox Server, or download media to Locker.
artist.playbackSandboxRequired: Full playback needs Sandbox Server — Settings → Vault → Sandbox Server, or Sovereign System Status
artist.playbackPreviewUnavailable: Start Sandbox Server for full playback
artist.playbackExoFailed: Playback failed — try again or disable ExoPlayer in Settings → Playback
artist.configureSandboxForStream: Start Sandbox Server for full playback — set LAN URL in Settings → Vault (e.g. http://192.168.x.x:3001)
artist.playbackSandboxUnreachable: Start Sandbox Server for full playback — server not reachable at configured URL

searchResults.notInCatalogLoading: Not in catalog — more results loading…
searchResults.notInCatalogReady: Not in catalog — more results below

dj.demoVisualHint: Animated preview — not live audio analysis
dj.bpmMatch: Sync this deck BPM to the other deck
dj.keyMatchHint: Load the best harmonically compatible track from your library onto the other deck
dj.keyMatchNone: Analyze tracks for key data first (ID3 or sonic analysis)
dj.stemLibraryHint: Locker tracks with Demucs stem status. Load any analyzed track onto Deck A or B.

audiobooks.title: Audiobooks
audiobooks.isolationNote: Reads Books / Audiobooks on this phone only. Never copies or deletes music locker or podcast audio.
audiobooks.idleHint: Scan for .m4b and files in Audiobooks / Books folders. Playback stays outside the music locker.
audiobooks.empty: No audiobooks found. Put files in Audiobooks or Books, or use .m4b.
audiobooks.androidOnly: Audiobook scan needs Android media access.
audiobooks.permissionDenied: Audio read permission is required to list audiobooks on this phone.
audiobooks.permissionDeniedHint: Allow music and audio access, then scan again. Nothing is copied or deleted.
audiobooks.discoverTabNote: Search LibriVox and Internet Archive. Stream or download chapters for offline listening.
audiobooks.discoverLead: Search LibriVox and Internet Archive catalogs. Tap a title for chapters, then play or save offline.
audiobooks.discoverHint: Search for a title or author. More sources (LearnOutLoud, Book Radio, etc.) planned for a future update.
audiobooks.searchEmpty: No audiobooks found. Try another search.
audiobooks.noChapters: No chapters found for this title.
audiobooks.missingAudio: No audio URL for this chapter.
audiobooks.playbackFailed: Audiobook playback failed — try again while online.
